description: Mid-range value with low capped value but excellent simulation isolation

value_density.rationale: Combined max value <0.1% of revenue, though MRP has broad operational impact not fully captured in capped figure

simulation_viability.rationale: Clear decision flows with self-contained inputs (BOM, demand, inventory) testable in isolation

anti_patterns: value_density and simulation_viability should NOT be the same — this is a case where they diverge significantly
simulation_viability should NOT be 1 — inputs are self-contained and isolatable
